mapper.sql: ticket_id, submit_time, current_status, current_stage_entered_at, analysis_duration_sec, analysis_trackable, modify_duration_sec, modify_trackable, push_duration_sec, push_trackable, closed_loop_duration_sec, closed_loop_completed, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem_ticket_metric ( ticket_id, submit_time, current_status, current_stage_entered_at, analysis_duration_sec, analysis_trackable, modify_duration_sec, modify_trackable, push_duration_sec, push_trackable, closed_loop_duration_sec, closed_loop_completed, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{ticketId}, #{submitTime}, #{currentStatus}, #{currentStageEnteredAt}, #{analysisDurationSec}, #{analysisTrackable}, #{modifyDurationSec}, #{modifyTrackable}, #{pushDurationSec}, #{pushTrackable}, #{closedLoopDurationSec}, #{closedLoopCompleted}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM problem_ticket_metric WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE problem_ticket_metric SET current_status = #{currentStatus}, current_stage_entered_at = #{currentStageEnteredAt}, analysis_duration_sec = #{analysisDurationSec}, analysis_trackable = #{analysisTrackable}, modify_duration_sec = #{modifyDurationSec}, modify_trackable = #{modifyTrackable}, push_duration_sec = #{pushDurationSec}, push_trackable = #{pushTrackable}, closed_loop_duration_sec = #{closedLoopDurationSec}, closed_loop_completed = #{closedLoopCompleted}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN m.analysis_trackable = TRUE THEN m.analysis_duration_sec + CASE WHEN m.current_status = 'ANALYZING' AND m.current_stage_entered_at IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, m.current_stage_entered_at, #{now}) ELSE 0 END END), 0) AS BIGINT), 0) AS analysis_avg_duration_sec, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN m.analysis_trackable = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS analysis_sample_count, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN m.modify_trackable = TRUE THEN m.modify_duration_sec + CASE WHEN m.current_status = 'FIXING' AND m.current_stage_entered_at IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, m.current_stage_entered_at, #{now}) ELSE 0 END END), 0) AS BIGINT), 0) AS modify_avg_duration_sec, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN m.modify_trackable = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS modify_sample_count, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN m.push_trackable = TRUE THEN m.push_duration_sec + CASE WHEN m.current_status = 'PUSHING' AND m.current_stage_entered_at IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, m.current_stage_entered_at, #{now}) ELSE 0 END END), 0) AS BIGINT), 0) AS push_avg_duration_sec, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN m.push_trackable = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS push_sample_count, COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN m.closed_loop_completed = TRUE THEN m.closed_loop_duration_sec END), 0) AS BIGINT), 0) AS closed_loop_avg_duration_sec, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN m.closed_loop_completed = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS closed_loop_sample_count FROM problem_ticket_metric m INNER JOIN problem_ticket t ON t.id = m.ticket_id WHERE t.deleted = FALSE
